name: heading
label: Heading
default: Your AWS Marketplace Partner Center 3.0 Migration — Done RIGHT For You, For Free, In Under 30 Minutes of Your Time.

name: body_text
label: Body Text
default: If you sell on AWS Marketplace, you need to migrate to Partner Center 3.0 before June 30, 2026. Most migrations fail because teams only think about moving data — not what happens after. g/d/n/a's cloud consulting team handles the entire lifecycle: the migration, the validation, and the workflows that keep you compliant long after go-live. No cost. No engineering lift.
